creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
when building the ports you should see this arg:
 -DGVLIBDIR=\"/usr/local/lib/graphviz\"

I am still unable to reproduce the error you see with proc mounted:

$ mount -t procfs proc /proc
$ proc /proc/self/maps
cat: /proc/self/map: No such file or directory

Please note all related proc/procfs entries/ and settings of your environment.
